issues.title: feat: add a session store
issues.body:
Add the session store in `src/store.ts`.

## Acceptance criteria

## Dependencies

issues.title: feat: add base configuration loader
issues.body:
Add the base configuration loader in `src/base.ts`.

## Acceptance criteria
